message:
Integrate circuit breaker with worker selection

- Add select_worker_with_config function with circuit state awareness
- Exclude workers with Open circuits from selection
- Allow HalfOpen workers only when probe budget available
- Apply half_open_penalty multiplier to HalfOpen worker scores
- Return AllCircuitsOpen reason when all workers have open circuits
- Update handle_select_worker to use new selection logic
- Add comprehensive tests for circuit breaker integration

Closes bead: ova

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
